channel.title: Releases on Econumo
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Econumo

item.title: v0.10.1
item.description: The v0.10.1 release adds a version indicator so you can always tell which build of Econumo you're running, and fixes a startup issue on Alpine-based images. Changelog # Added a display of Econumo's current version. Fixed an Alpine entrypoint failure by replacing su with su-exec. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.10.1

item.title: v0.10.0
item.description: The v0.10.0 release raises the character limit for account names, categories, recipients, senders, tags, and budgets from 18 to 64 characters, giving you much more room for descriptive names. The transaction list component has also been refined to prevent accidental switching. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.10.0

item.title: v0.9.0
item.description: The v0.9.0 release brings Econumo together as a fully open-source project in a single repository, now licensed under the permissive MIT license. It also improves the consistency of dialog windows and delivers an enhanced shared-access screen. Changelog # Merged Econumo’s source code into a single repository. Changed the license from AGPLv3 to MIT. Improved dialog window consistency. Enhanced the shared access screen. Upgraded PHP to version 8.5. GitHub releases #

item.title: v0.8.1
item.description: The v0.8.1 release enhances the Import functionality, letting you override any field during the import process for greater control over your data. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.8.1

item.title: v0.8.0
item.description: The v0.8.0 release introduces Import/Export functionality, making it easy to back up your data or migrate between different instances of Econumo. Changelog # Breaking Changes: EconumoFamilyBundle code merged into EconumoBundle and removed. No functionality changes. Deprecated: The System API was deprecated in version 0.8.0 and will be removed in version 1.0.0. Introduced CSV Import/Export functionality. Introduced command ./bin/console app:update-currency-rates to update currency exchange rates from https://openexchangerates.org as a replacement for

item.title: v0.7.0
item.description: The v0.7.0 release adds experimental PostgreSQL support. As it is still in beta and has known performance limitations, we don't yet recommend it for production use. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.7.0

item.title: v0.6.0
item.description: The v0.6.0 release completely rewrites how Econumo handles numbers and currencies. Each currency can now use its own number of fraction digits (up to 8), ensuring precise budget conversions — even for older periods. After deploying this version, it is recommended to run the following command: docker-compose exec -u www-data econumo bin/console app:restore-currency-fraction-digits Changelog # Enhanced the command docker-compose exec -u www-data econumo bin/console app:add-currency --help, enabling you to specify

item.title: v0.5.2
item.description: The v0.5.2 release is a small follow-up that fixes an issue reported by the community after the announcement of Econumo CE. Changelog # Fixed a bug affecting multiple currencies that had no exchange rates. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.5.2

item.title: v0.5.1
item.description: The v0.5.1 release primarily includes bug fixes and minor improvements based on feedback from the Reddit community following the announcement of Econumo CE. Changelog # Fixed the display of multiple expense transactions with the same category in the budget. Added a placeholder for the transaction entry form. Resolved issues with the date range functionality in the budget. Added a "Shared Access" page to Econumo CE. Fixed the /api/v1/system/import-currency-rates endpoint to

item.title: v0.5.0
item.description: The v0.5.0 release introduces user onboarding and a calculator widget for transactions, alongside a large batch of budget refinements and bug fixes. Changelog # Added user onboarding. Added more icons for categories. Added a calculator widget for the transaction dialog. Refactored logic related to budget loading. Refactored the BudgetAccessModal component. Refactored the BudgetChangeCurrency component. Improved handling of the long-press directive. Fixed issue where new envelopes were created in the second

item.title: v0.4.3
item.description: The v0.4.3 release adds a running Total to the budgeting module, making it easier to see the big picture at a glance. Changelog # Added a "Total" amount to the budgeting module. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.4.3

item.title: v0.4.1
item.description: The v0.4.1 release includes minor fixes and configuration improvements. Changelog # Updated email content. Added the ECONUMOBASEURL environment variable. Fixed a bug related to the default locale. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.4.1

item.title: v0.4.0
item.description: The v0.4.0 release adds user registration and delivers a broad set of budgeting improvements and bug fixes. Changelog # Added a registration feature and updated the configuration and login layout. Corrected the translation for "All accounts." Fixed budget calculations for individual users. Resolved issues with the modal window displaying the transaction list for budgets. Introduced user avatars in the transaction list modal for budgets. Fixed a bug that displayed ghost

item.title: v0.3.0
item.description: The v0.3.0 release unifies Econumo's editions: the previously separate products are merged into a single, fully open-source Econumo CE, while the hosted service simply becomes Econumo. Changelog # Econumo Family and Econumo One merged into Econumo CE and were fully open-sourced. Econumo Cloud became Econumo. Fixed a problem with currency rates for the Budget module. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.3.0

item.title: v0.2.3
item.description: The v0.2.3 release brings small refinements to the login flow, legal pages, and branding. Changelog # Disabled part of the login form for the custom backend API URL. Updated the links to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages. Added the edition name to the logo. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.2.3

item.title: v0.2.2
item.description: The v0.2.2 hotfix restores authentication by rolling back a dependency update that broke it in the previous version. Changelog # Rolled back the dependency update in composer.lock that broke authentication. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.2.2

item.title: v0.2.1
item.description: The v0.2.1 release makes it easier for people to collaborate by connecting registered users with one another automatically. Changelog # Added the ability to connect registered users with one another automatically. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.2.1

item.title: v0.2.0
item.description: The v0.2.0 release focuses on backend cleanup and infrastructure improvements that lay the groundwork for future development. Changelog # Removed the legacy PostgreSQL dependency. Added an X-Timezone header to each API request to maintain consistent time zones between the frontend and backend. Addressed all of Rector's warnings. Removed the old analytics API. Update API documentation. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.2.0

item.title: v0.1.0
item.description: The first public release of Econumo — the beginning of an open, self-hosted way to manage your personal and family finances. GitHub releases # Econumo: v0.1.0
